goal.primary: Drive qualified HVAC calls and contact clicks from homeowners and business owners in Mississippi and Louisiana service areas.
secondary: Build trust through real imagery, brand familiarity, and visible licensing.
Present repair, installation, maintenance, and indoor air quality services in a visual card layout.
Keep mobile conversion friction low with a burger menu and direct tap targets.

audience.segment: Homeowners, commercial property contacts, and local prospects seeking HVAC repair, installation, or maintenance.
pain_points: Need for a contractor who services multiple equipment brands
Need for visible proof of credibility and licensing
Need for a mobile-friendly path to contact
objections: Fear of generic, untrustworthy contractor websites
desired_outcomes: Confirm the company offers the needed HVAC service quickly
See real service imagery and brand support before contacting
Reach the correct phone number with one tap
Trust the company enough to book service

business_context.offer_type: Repair, installation, maintenance, indoor air quality, and multi-brand support
business_context.market_category: Local residential and commercial home services
business_context.brand_tone: Bold, practical, dependable, local, and conversion-focused

must_have: Hero uses a full-banner background image with visible CTA above the fold
All images from assets/images are represented on the page
Services are shown as image-led cards with round icon badges
Footer mirrors the reference site's dark visual weight and multi-column structure
Mobile navigation is handled with a burger menu
nice_to_have: Brand logos create a dedicated proof wall
Contact section combines tap targets and licensing proof
Footer retains payments and social cues without feeling overloaded
